name: MaintenanceDeluxe
overview: Premium maintenance overlay with live countdown and rich release notes.
description: Premium cinema-themed maintenance overlay for Jellyfin. Full-screen velours-and-gold overlay with a drifting aurora background, a rotating film-reel logo, crackling ember particles and a brushed-metal card border. Live countdown adapts to the remaining time, time-based progress bar turns amber when you overshoot the window. Admin-configurable release notes (icon + title + markdown body, up to 20 sections), quick-add templates, emoji palette, markdown live preview, character counters. Preview button auto-saves the current form and renders the overlay with your real settings without activating maintenance.

versions.changelog: v0.1.8 - Save chain made resilient: the maintenance fields now always persist, even if the general banner/preset config save fails (previously a broken banner URL would silently block the maintenance save). Preview button auto-saves before opening, so you always see your latest edits. Release-note templates: 6 quick-add buttons (Movies, Series, Update, Cleanup, Security, Network) to scaffold sections in one click.
